title: Update ClaudeCodeAgentRunner to accept config and resolve per-agent tools
description: Update ClaudeCodeAgentRunner.__init__ to replace claude_bin with config and backend parameters. Update _exec_json() to accept an agent_type keyword parameter, resolve allowed tools via self.config.allowed_tools_for('claude', agent_type or 'developer'), and build the command from self.backend.binary and self.backend.flags. Update run_bead() to pass agent_type=bead.agent_type to _exec_json(). Update _retry_structured_output() to accept and thread through agent_type. Update propose_plan() to pass agent_type='planner'. Structural flags (-p, --output-format json, --json-schema) must remain inline. Provide backward compatibility when config is not passed.
acceptance_criteria: ClaudeCodeAgentRunner.__init__ accepts config and backend instead of claude_bin
ClaudeCodeAgentRunner._exec_json() accepts agent_type parameter and resolves tools via config.allowed_tools_for()
Hardcoded claude binary name, --dangerously-skip-permissions, and the --allowedTools string no longer appear in runner.py
ClaudeCodeAgentRunner() with no arguments falls back to default_config()
